settings.heading: In memory of a Pacific Coast coffee legend, Mike Gobel
settings.body:
It all started in the early 2010s when Dave walked into Mike’s Highway 9 coffee shop and the two hit it off instantly. What began as a friendship turned into a full-blown partnership, with the two buying a coffee roaster together and bonding over their love of the craft.

Tragically, we lost Mike in 2024. Losing a friend and partner hit Dave hard, but it also sparked a deeper connection. This loss brought him closer to the Pacific Coast recovery community, and today he’s a dedicated advocate for addiction and rehabilitation, keeping Mike’s story alive along the way.

10% of every bag of Mike’s Blend goes straight to supporting the Pacific Coast recovery community — a small way of honoring the guy who inspired it all.

settings.title: SMALL BATCH
settings.text: Every roast is made in small quantities to ensure freshness and quality. We roast weekly and ship within 48 hours.

settings.title: THIRD WAVE
settings.text: We source responsibly from hand-picked farmers around the world who share our commitment to quality and sustainability.

settings.title: COMMUNITY FIRST
settings.text: 10% of every bag of Mike’s Blend supports the Pacific Coast recovery community. Coffee that gives back.
We brew every Saturday at the Saratoga Farmers’ Market. Come say hello, taste the latest roast, and take home a bag. It’s where Pacific Coast Roasters started — and where we still show up every week.
